---
title: "Contact"
---

I am always happy to discuss research on computational social sciences, well-being, and retirement pension systems. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

- **Email:** [sergio.bacelar@gmail.com](mailto:sergio.bacelar@gmail.com)
- **GitHub:** [github.com/sbacelar](https://github.com/sbacelar)
- **Photography:** [Flickr](https://www.flickr.com/photos/sbac54/)
